title: AI Image AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: NYC-style subway staircase street fashion portrait. Location: Christopher Street subway entrance in Greenwich Village, with a readable Christopher St Sheridan Sq sign, railings, sidewalk edge, and stair geometry. Subject: adult woman with light brown shoulder-length wavy hair and soft bangs, standing on the steps with body angled downward and head turned back over the shoulder. Outfit: beige ribbed turtleneck sweater with sleeve buttons and high-waisted dark denim skirt; accessory detail: small shoulder bag with pink faux-fur charm. Pose and Expression: slight twist back toward camera with curious calm expression, calm direct contact with the camera, natural fashion-street confidence. Light and Palette: soft late-afternoon city daylight; beige knit, dark denim, black subway rail, and muted brick tones. Camera: Vertical editorial street portrait, shallow depth of field, realistic skin and fabric texture. Restrictions: No real brand logos, no distorted stair perspective, no oversexualized pose, no plastic skin, no random text.
